common.something_went_wrong: Something went wrong :/ Please retry or contact support.

header.subtitle: Manage integrations for this workspace.
header.which_integration: Which integration are you looking for?

hero.aws_description: AWS is a cloud computing platform that provides a range of services for building and running applications.

regions.which_regions: Which regions do you want to monitor?
regions.choose_regions_short: Choose only the regions you want DS-APM to monitor.
regions.choose_regions_long: Choose only the regions you want DS-APM to monitor. You can enable all at once, or pick specific ones:

setup.deploy_stack_title: Where should we deploy the DS-APM Cloud stack?
setup.deploy_stack_description: Choose the AWS region for CloudFormation stack deployment
setup.compliance_note: Note: Some organizations may require the CloudFormation stack to be deployed in the same region as their primary infrastructure for compliance or latency reasons.

remove_account.desc1: Removing this account will remove all components created for sending telemetry to DS-APM in your AWS account within the next ~15 minutes (cloudformation stacks named signoz-integration-telemetry-collection in enabled regions).
remove_account.desc2: After that, you can delete the cloudformation stack that was created manually when connecting this account.

s3.region_disabled: Region disabled in account settings; S3 buckets here will not be synced.

detail.testing_no_data: We have not received data from your {{title}} Instance yet. You need to manually configure your {{title}} instance to start sending data to DS-APM.
detail.not_installed_no_data: You would need to manually configure your {{title}} instance to start sending data to DS-APM.
detail.no_data_help: If you have already configured your resources to send data, sit tight and wait for the data to flow in, Or else, see the steps to configure your resources to start sending data.

uninstall.subtitle: Removing the {{title}} integration would make your workspace stop listening for data from {{title}} instances.
uninstall.remove_text: Removing this integration makes DS-APM stop listening for data from {{title}} instances. You would still have to manually remove the configuration in your code to stop sending data.

alert.connection_failed: We couldn't establish a connection to your AWS account. Please try again
